title: Verify Remind Me toggle sends WhatsApp notification 24hrs before trial ends
description: Test that enabling the 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle triggers a WhatsApp notification reminder
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Manage Trial section

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
4. Toggle ON 'Remind me 24h before trial ends'
5. Wait for 24 hours before trial end (or simulate time)

expected_result: User receives WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends with option to decide then
